testcase.name: searchOff with no results sets NoResults state
saveEntry creates LogEntry with correctly scaled values from food
setWeight with non-numeric string clears scaled nutrition
setWeight for recipe computes proportional nutrition based on recipe totals
searchOff with results updates state to Results
saveEntry creates LogEntry with recipe-scaled values
setWeight with very large value does not crash and produces large scaled result
setWeight with 100g returns values equal to per-100g reference
setWeight with 200g produces correctly scaled nutrition for API food
food with missing kcal cannot produce scaled nutrition until override applied
setWeight with negative value does not produce scaled nutrition
setWeight with zero does not compute scaled nutrition
